entities.name: CLIMATE AND CATCHMENT CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Characteristics of the climate and the physical catchment area, including land and water use and management

entities.name: LAND AND WATER USE AND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices related to how land and water are utilized and managed within a catchment

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate at which the population increases, influencing resource management and water demands

entities.name: FUTURE FOOD HABITS
entities.description: Expected changes in dietary patterns that affect land and water use

entities.name: WATER DEMANDS
entities.description: The amount of water required for various human and agricultural uses

entities.name: A1B SCENARIO
entities.description: A specific emissions scenario from the IPCC Special Report on Emissions Scenarios used for climate simulation

entities.name: PRECIS
entities.description: Providing Regional Climates for Impact Studies, a method used for downscaling climate simulations

entities.name: QUANTILE MAPPING
entities.description: A bias correction method used to refine downscaled climate data

entities.name: MODIFIED SWAT
entities.description: A semi-distributed integrated model (Modified Soil and Water Assessment Tool) used to predict hydrological impacts

entities.name: HIMAYAT SAGAR CATCHMENT
entities.description: The specific semi-arid catchment area in which the study was conducted

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Future changes in climatic patterns affecting the hydrological system

entities.name: STREAMFLOW
entities.description: The volume of water flowing through a stream channel

entities.name: GROUNDWATER STORAGE
entities.description: The volume of water stored in the subsurface aquifers

entities.name: ACTUAL EVAPORATION
entities.description: The actual amount of water evaporated from the land and water surfaces

entities.name: BASE FLOW
entities.description: The portion of streamflow derived from groundwater seepage

entities.name: ANTHROPOGENIC CHANGES
entities.description: Human-induced changes to the environment, such as land use and water management
